name: Provider System Refactor
description: Refactor AI provider architecture with auto-fallback registry system, consolidate UI components into single StoryFlow, and update processors to use new registry pattern.

userStories.title: Create flows types module
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want consolidated types so that all flow-related types are in one place.

Implementation: Create src/lib/flows/types.ts with the EXACT code from the '## src/lib/flows/types.ts' section in prd.md (lines 496-542). This defines Segment, EntityAsset, AudioBatch, TranscriptionResult, CaptionStyle, CommentatorConfig interfaces and DEFAULT_CAPTION_STYLE constant.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/flows/types.ts
Define Segment interface with text, type, entities, imagePrompt, imagePath
Define EntityAsset interface
Define AudioBatch interface
Define TranscriptionResult interface
Define CaptionStyle interface with fontSize, fontFamily, fontWeight, maxWordsPerLine, uppercase, highlightColor
Define CommentatorConfig interface
Export DEFAULT_CAPTION_STYLE constant

userStories.title: Create AI config and registry modules
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want a centralized config and registry so that providers can be registered and executed with automatic fallback.

Implementation: Create two files using the EXACT code from prd.md:
1. src/lib/ai/config.ts — from '## src/lib/ai/config.ts' section (lines 56-88). Defines ActionType, ModelConfig, ACTIONS record, and getCredentials function.
2. src/lib/ai/registry.ts — from '## src/lib/ai/registry.ts' section (lines 92-165). Defines request/response types, Provider interface, registerProvider, and execute function with fallback chain.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/config.ts with ActionType ('generateText' | 'generateImage' | 'generateAudio') and ModelConfig types
Export ACTIONS record mapping action types to ordered provider/model arrays
Export getCredentials function that reads PROVIDER_BASE_URL and PROVIDER_API_KEY env vars
Create src/lib/ai/registry.ts with TextRequest/TextResponse, ImageRequest/ImageResponse, AudioRequest/AudioResponse interfaces
Define Provider interface with optional generateText, generateImage, generateAudio handlers
Implement registerProvider function using a Map<string, Provider>
Implement execute function that iterates ACTIONS[action] chain, tries each provider in order, logs attempts, and throws aggregated error if all fail

userStories.title: Create all providers and index
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want void, naga, and air providers registered so that the execute function can dispatch to them.

Implementation: Create four files using the EXACT code from prd.md:
1. src/lib/ai/providers/void.ts — from '## src/lib/ai/providers/void.ts' section (lines 169-226). Implements generateText (streaming SSE) and generateImage (multimodal content).
2. src/lib/ai/providers/naga.ts — from '## src/lib/ai/providers/naga.ts' section (lines 230-251). Implements generateAudio returning ArrayBuffer.
3. src/lib/ai/providers/air.ts — from '## src/lib/ai/providers/air.ts' section (lines 255-282). Implements generateImage with b64_json and url support.
4. src/lib/ai/providers/index.ts — from '## src/lib/ai/providers/index.ts' section (lines 286-293). Imports all three providers and re-exports execute.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/providers/void.ts with generateText (streaming SSE parsing) and generateImage (multimodal content with responseModalities IMAGE)
Create src/lib/ai/providers/naga.ts with generateAudio handler that calls /v1/audio/speech and returns ArrayBuffer
Create src/lib/ai/providers/air.ts with generateImage handler that calls /v1/images/generations and supports b64_json and url responses
Create src/lib/ai/providers/index.ts that imports './void', './naga', './air' and re-exports execute from '../registry'
All providers register themselves via registerProvider on import

userStories.title: Create all processors
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want scene-visualizer, image-generator, audio-generator, and commentator processors so that the API routes can use them.

Implementation: Create four files using the EXACT code from prd.md:
1. src/lib/ai/processors/scene-visualizer.ts — from section lines 297-350. Exports generateSceneDescriptions.
2. src/lib/ai/processors/image-generator.ts — from section lines 354-393. Exports generateSingleImage with resolveImage helper.
3. src/lib/ai/processors/audio-generator.ts — from section lines 397-457. Exports generateAudio with batch processing.
4. src/lib/ai/processors/commentator.ts — from section lines 461-491. Exports generateCommentsWithCommentator.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/processors/scene-visualizer.ts with SceneVisualizationRequest interface and generateSceneDescriptions function
scene-visualizer uses execute('generateText') and parses JSON from markdown code blocks
Create src/lib/ai/processors/image-generator.ts with GenerateImageRequest interface, resolveImage helper, and generateSingleImage function
image-generator uses execute('generateImage') and handles reference images from local filesystem
Create src/lib/ai/processors/audio-generator.ts with AudioBatch interface, audioDir helper, generateAndSave helper, and generateAudio function
audio-generator processes batches in parallel chunks of 4 with staggered 800ms delays and 2 retry attempts
Create src/lib/ai/processors/commentator.ts with generateCommentsWithCommentator function
commentator uses execute('generateText') with COMMENTATOR_PROMPT and maps response to Segment types

userStories.title: Create consolidated hooks
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want all hooks in one file so that they are easy to maintain and import.

Implementation: Create src/lib/flows/hooks.ts using the EXACT code from the '## src/lib/flows/hooks.ts' section in prd.md (lines 546-779). This consolidates 5 hooks into one file: useAudio, useTranscription, useVideo, useProject, useDownload.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/flows/hooks.ts
Implement useAudio hook with generate (POST /api/generate/audio) and regenerateBatch
Implement useTranscription hook with transcribe (POST /api/generate/transcription) and retry
Implement useVideo hook with generate (alignVideoProps) and render (POST /api/render with SSE progress streaming)
Implement useProject hook with load (GET /api/projects/:id) and save (POST /api/projects)
Implement useDownload hook with downloadZip (POST /api/generate/zip)

userStories.title: Update API routes to use new processors
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want updated API routes so that they use the new processors instead of old pipeline.

Implementation: Update six route files using the EXACT code from prd.md 'API Routes' section (lines 1595-1721):
1. src/app/api/generate/audio/route.ts — import generateAudio from processors
2. src/app/api/generate/commentator/route.ts — import generateCommentsWithCommentator from processors
3. src/app/api/generate/descriptions/route.ts — import generateSceneDescriptions from processors
4. src/app/api/generate/entities/descriptions/route.ts — import execute from providers and use ENHANCE_ENTITIES_PROMPT
5. src/app/api/generate/images/route.ts — import generateSingleImage from processors and StorageService
6. src/app/api/generate/split/route.ts — import splitText from text-segmentation
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/app/api/generate/audio/route.ts to import and use generateAudio from @/lib/ai/processors/audio-generator
Update src/app/api/generate/commentator/route.ts to import and use generateCommentsWithCommentator from @/lib/ai/processors/commentator
Update src/app/api/generate/descriptions/route.ts to import and use generateSceneDescriptions from @/lib/ai/processors/scene-visualizer
Update src/app/api/generate/entities/descriptions/route.ts to import execute from @/lib/ai/providers and use ENHANCE_ENTITIES_PROMPT
Update src/app/api/generate/images/route.ts to import generateSingleImage from @/lib/ai/processors/image-generator and StorageService for base64 saving
Update src/app/api/generate/split/route.ts to import splitText from @/lib/text-segmentation

userStories.title: Create StoryFlow component and update Home page
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want a single StoryFlow component and updated home page so that the UI is consolidated.

Implementation: Create/update two files using the EXACT code from prd.md:
1. src/components/StoryFlow.tsx — from '## src/components/StoryFlow.tsx' section (lines 893-1591). Single file replacing all flow components.
2. src/app/page.tsx — from '## src/app/page.tsx' section (lines 789-889). Home page with project list and flow selection.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/StoryFlow.tsx with Stage type, getStages helper, and all stage render sections
StoryFlow implements all 9 stages: input, commentator, comments, descriptions, entities, images, audio, transcription, video
StoryFlow implements exec object mapping each stage to its action function
StoryFlow implements bottom bar with back/execute/next navigation
Update src/app/page.tsx with project list, delete functionality, and flow type selection (simple/commentator)
Home page renders StoryFlow when flow type is selected
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Delete obsolete files and update env
userStories.description:
As a developer, I want to remove all obsolete files and update .env.example now that replacements are in place.

Implementation:
1. Delete all files listed in the DELETE section of prd.md (lines 8-19): pipeline.ts, custom-client.ts, createForm.tsx, flows/ dir, shared/ dir, old hook files, old route.
2. Update .env.example using the code from prd.md lines 39-52 with VOID, NAGA, AIR credentials and DEBUG_LOG.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete src/lib/pipeline.ts
Delete src/lib/ai/providers/custom-client.ts
Delete src/components/createForm.tsx
Delete src/components/flows/ directory entirely
Delete src/components/shared/ directory entirely
Delete src/lib/flows/use-audio-generation.ts
Delete src/lib/flows/use-image-generation.ts
Delete src/lib/flows/use-transcription.ts
Delete src/lib/flows/use-video-generation.ts
Delete src/lib/flows/use-project.ts
Delete src/app/api/generate/route.ts
Update .env.example with VOID_BASE_URL, VOID_API_KEY, NAGA_BASE_URL, NAGA_API_KEY, AIR_BASE_URL, AIR_API_KEY, DEBUG_LOG
bun run typecheck passes
bun run lint passes
